summary: Synchronize generated root governance owner views after ADP S1-06 raised arxiv-daily-push to version 0.16.0 and introduced S1-07 as the next executable task. Restrict the arxiv S1 current-phase priority so it does not reorder other projects' owner-facing next tasks.
rollback: Revert this manifest, the root dashboard generated views, the generate_governance_dashboard.py current-phase priority guard and the associated governance test changes.
unresolved_risks: This repair does not enable production scheduling, SMTP delivery or Release upload.
GitHub Actions must still attest the final pushed commit after merge.
Branch protection remains subject to GitHub repository settings and is not changed by this run.
self_reference_policy: content_tree_hash excludes this manifest because a file cannot contain its own final hash before commit; CI attestation must bind the final commit after push.
